overview.short: Makrandgad Fort is a fort near Pratapgad Fort.
overview.description: Makrandgad Fort is a fort near Pratapgad Fort. It is located 156km from Pune, in Satara district, of Maharashtra. The fort is located in the midst of the famous Javli forest. The fort is accessible from the Hatlot and Ghonaspur village.

topPlaces.name: Bholavali
topPlaces.description: Bholavali is a small village in Mandangad, Ratnagiri district, Maharashtra state in Western India. The 2011 Census of India recorded a total of 823 residents in the village.

topPlaces.name: Lok Bhavan, Mahabaleshwar
topPlaces.description: Lok Bhavan formerly Raj Bhavan, Mahabaleshwar is the summer residence of the Governor of Maharashtra. It is located in the hill station town of Mahabaleshwar, Maharashtra.

items.note: Bholavali is a small village in Mandangad, Ratnagiri district, Maharashtra state in Western India. The 2011 Census of India recorded a total of 823 residents in the village.
Lok Bhavan formerly Raj Bhavan, Mahabaleshwar is the summer residence of the Governor of Maharashtra. It is located in the hill station town of Mahabaleshwar, Maharashtra.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Makrandgad?
faq.a: The best time to visit Makrandgad is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

The nearest airport is Pune Airport (88 km) and the nearest railway station is Pune Junction (81 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Makrandgad?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Makrandgad at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Makrandgad?
faq.a: Stays in Makrandgad start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Makrandgad?
faq.a: The top attractions are Bholavali, Lok Bhavan, Mahabaleshwar.
